name: macOS Notification Banner
description: 拟真 macOS 通知 banner + app icon + 标题正文, 适合 video overlay / 产品发布预告
usage: 【模板: macOS 通知横幅】 拟真 macOS 通知 banner + app icon + 标题正文, 适合 video overlay / 产品发布预告
trigger_terms: 拟真 macOS 通知 banner + app icon + 标题正文, 适合 video overlay / 产品发布预告
macOS 通知 · 新功能发布
Big Sur 磨砂玻璃 banner
best_for: 拟真 macOS 通知 banner + app icon + 标题正文, 适合 video overlay / 产品发布预告
Requests that need social card and shareable visual content.
Use when the user asks for macOS 通知横幅.
avoid_for: Requests unrelated to this template category or scenario.
Cases where the user explicitly asks for a different medium, layout, or visual style.
layout_rules: 【意图】把一段公告 / 消息 / 提示渲染成 macOS Big Sur+ 风格的通知横幅, 适合视频角落叠加、产品发布预告、社媒图。Inspired by hyperframes macos-notification。
style_rules: 背景: **frosted glass** 效果 — `background: rgba(245,245,247,0.78)` + `backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(180%)`; 暗色版 `rgba(28,28,30,0.78)`。
入场动效: 从屏幕外右侧滑入 `transform: translateX(110%)→0`, 200ms ease-out; 可被 `prefers-reduced-motion` 关闭。
light mode 背景白磨砂, dark mode (推荐 video) 几乎黑磨砂。
content_rules: 必须用用户提供的内容; 标题 + 正文清晰来自用户输入。
quality_checks: Use the reference HTML as a style and structure guide, not as final placeholder content.
Preserve user-provided facts, numbers, dates, and claims.
Return one complete standalone HTML file with no markdown wrapper.
Keep visible text readable and avoid overlapping UI or content blocks.
